
# ΩQCS – Validation Protocol

## 1. Independent Validation Requirement
Validation must be conducted by a separate risk or model validation unit.

## 2. Test Categories
- Input sensitivity re-run testing
- Collision detection reproducibility
- External coefficient stress injection
- Governance trace integrity audit

## 3. Stress Scenario Design
Simulate:
- Regulatory shock
- Market contraction
- Competitive acceleration

## 4. Reproducibility
All outputs must be traceable through stored audit logs.
